nasb.text: He took the elders of the city, and thorns of the wilderness and briers, and he disciplined the men of Succoth with them.

esv.text: And he took the elders of the city, and he took thorns of the wilderness and briers and with them taught the men of Succoth a lesson.

cnv.text: 於是拿住那城的長老，又拿起野地的荊棘，用荊棘把疏割人教訓了一頓；

ccb.text: 说完，就捉住城中的长老，用荒野的荆棘抽打他们。
